name: cu-product-expiry
description: CU Convenience Store Product Expiry Management System

scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npx vite build
scripts.prod: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server/index.js
